testsuite.name: 正常执行测试

testcase.name: 执行返回布尔值 false 的脚本应返回 REJECT
执行返回 String 的脚本应作为 decision
执行返回 Map 的脚本应正确解析
执行返回布尔值 true 的脚本应返回 PASS
执行应包含执行上下文

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:55.622 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule rule-002 executed in 1ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.626 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule rule-004 executed in 2ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.652 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule rule-003 executed in 5ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.655 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule rule-001 executed in 1ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.658 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule rule-005 executed in 1ms
